stemHtml:
A pilot flying an arrival procedure (STAR) inbound to an airport changes the altimeter subscale during the descent whilst passing the transition level. Given the following information, what will the pilot expect the new altimeter reading to show immediately after changing the subscale setting?

QNH: 1043 hPa
Transition altitude: 5000 ft
Transition level: FL60
(Assume 30 ft per hPa)
